hooks.command: wts=$(git -C "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)" worktree list --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep '^worktree' | awk '{print $2}'); failures=""; for wt in $wts; do branch=$(git -C "$wt" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$branch" ] || [ "$branch" = "HEAD" ] || [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ] && continue; pr_num=$(gh pr view "$branch" --json number -q .number 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$pr_num" ] && continue; result=$(gh pr checks "$branch" --watch 2>&1 || true); f=$(echo "$result" | grep -iE "(型チェック|tsc|Jest)" | grep -iE "(fail|×)" || true); [ -n "$f" ] && failures="${failures}PR#${pr_num}(${branch}): ${f}\n"; done; [ -z "$failures" ] && exit 0; printf '{"systemMessage": "\u274c CI失敗:\n%s"}' "$(printf '%b' "$failures")"; exit 2
